allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@95.216.139.172 "echo ''=== DISK ==='' && df -h / && echo ''=== RAM ==='' && free -h && echo ''=== CPU ==='' && nproc && cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep ''model name'' | head -1 && echo ''=== OS ==='' && cat /etc/os-release | head -5 && echo ''=== DOCKER ==='' && docker --version 2>/dev/null || echo ''Docker not installed'' && echo ''=== RUNNING CONTAINERS ==='' && docker ps 2>/dev/null || echo ''no docker''")
